_comment: OTel Demo cross-app corpus manifest. Tracks the run plans that compose the full ~135-run collection per docs5/00 §5.5.5. Updated 2026-06-08 after authoring the full 47-scenario set.

run_plans.purpose: Phase 2 pilot — go/no-go before full collection. 11 representative scenarios.
Baselines (no-fault windows) for the negative class
L1 single-fault — 33 distinct scenarios covering all primitives (ScaleDeployment, RestartPods, SetEnv, Flagd-16 flags)
5 NEW Kafka families — architectural-distance evidence (no OB analogues)
L2 concurrent (5) + L3 cascade (4) — graded difficulty evidence per docs5/00 §5.5

notes: Phase 2 local pilot validated on 2026-06-08: 94/94 triage_feature_* columns produced, all harness primitives green. Ready for full GCP collection. Total target ~70 runs (matches docs5/00 §5.5.5 targets scaled to the authored 44-scenario set).
